description_long: This is a modern, multi-story urban house with a flat roof and a mix of brick and concrete exterior finishes. The building features large, rectangular windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, providing ample natural light to the interior. The ground floor includes two distinct entryways, one with a covered carport and another with a shaded outdoor seating area, both accessible from the street. The property is landscaped with several trees and small garden patches, and there are visible balconies and rooftop terraces adorned with greenery. Vehicles are parked in designated areas, including a carport and a driveway, enhancing the urban residential feel. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, multi-story urban house with flat roofs, large windows, brick and concrete finishes, and landscaped outdoor areas. Features include carports, balconies, and rooftop terraces.
description_view_0: Front view showing two main entryways, a red car parked under a canopy, outdoor seating, and large windows with a mix of brick and concrete facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the main street-facing facade, a white van parked in the driveway, and prominent glass windows with visible rooftop greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a private garden, carport, and more subdued window arrangement with visible rooftop terraces and greenery.
description_view_3: Back-side view showing a simpler brick and concrete wall, rooftop terraces, and the red canopy over the outdoor seating area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some symmetrical rows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature wide glass doors, one with a covered carport and another with a shaded porch and outdoor seating, both accessible from the street.
